name: Peppermint Christmas Cooler
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Vanilla regular, low-fat or Nonfat ice cream
5 Peppermint candies or 3 mini Candy canes
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the first three ingredients in an electric blender until smooth.
2. Scrape down the sides of the blender and add 1-3 ice cubes to bring the mixture to the 2-cup level.
3. Process until smooth.
4. Serve immediately, garnished with another candy cane.
